subcodes.first_line: O Javád! This is a year of grievous trials for the servants, a year of destiny ordained for Us. Should it come upon Us, verily We are well-content [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جواد این سنه شداد است للعباد سنه قضاست لاجلنا ان ورد علینا فانا خیر راض و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @law of Huququ'llah, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
